name: Viennese Breakfast Cake (Kh)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Finely chopped walnuts or Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Day ahead, make dough; if possible, check temperature of warm water with thermometer (105-115). Sprinkle yeast over water in large bowl of electric mixer; stir until dissolved. Add sugar, salt, peel, 1 cup butter, 6 eggs and 3 cups flour.
2. At medium speed, beat for 4 minutes. Add remaining flour; at low speed, beat until smooth about 2 minutes. Cover bowl with waxed paper, then with a damp towel; let rise in warm place, draft-free, until double in bulk about 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
3. Refrigerate, covered, overnight. Next day, make filling: In medium bowl, with wooden spoon, mix 3 tablespoons butter; brown sugar and yolks. Stir in milk and vanilla; blend in nuts. Grease two 9x5x3 inches pans. Remove dough from refrigerator.
4. Stir dough down with wooden spoon. Dough will be soft. Turn out onto lightly floured board; divide in half. Return half to bowl and place in refrigerator. On lightly floured pastry cloth or surface, roll half of the dough into a rectangle, 14 by 9 inches.
5. Brush with 1 tablespoon melted butter. Spread with half of filling, to 1/2 inch from edge. From each end, roll up dough lengthwise, jelly-roll fashion, toward center. Turn loaf over; place in prepared pan, smooth side up. Lightly brush with melted butter.
6. Repeat with rest of dough. Let rise in warm place, covered with towel, draft-free, until double in bulk, about 1 1/2 hours. Preheat oven to 350. Bake for 35 minutes or till golden brown. Remove from pan to rack. Sprinkle with confectioners sugar.
